message:
fix(fnp-ufunc): modf preserves negative sign for zero fractional part + conformance tests

Bug: modf(-1.0) returned (0.0, -1.0) instead of (-0.0, -1.0).
NumPy preserves the sign of the input in the fractional part even
when it's zero. Now modf(-2.0) correctly returns (-0.0, -2.0).

Also adds conformance_frexp_modf.rs with 10 tests covering:
- 50+ input cases for frexp and modf
- Empty arrays, dtypes, shape preservation
- Roundtrip verification (ldexp(frexp(x)) == x, modf(x)[0] + modf(x)[1] == x)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
